premarket.market_expectations: Neutral bias expected with mixed signals. S&P futures dipped slightly while Nasdaq fell more sharply. Bond yields and dollar weakened, but domestic institutional buying provided support. Rising oil prices and rupee depreciation add pressure. Previous close near the high end of its range suggests some upward momentum remains.

news.headline_reworded: Markets edge up slightly after losing earlier gains
news.why_it_matters: Shows resilience despite volatility, hinting at cautious optimism.

news.why_it_matters: Sustained gains and lower volatility could attract more buyers.

news.why_it_matters: Signals potential bullish momentum if volatility remains subdued.

news.why_it_matters: Highlights market sensitivity to upcoming corporate results.

news.why_it_matters: Underscores how poor earnings can trigger severe stock reactions.
